source_metadata.title: 2025 08 21 Petitions
source_metadata.description:
Petition of Problem Gambling Foundation of New Zealand: Prohibit the advertising of gambling

Submitters
Problem Gambling Foundation of New Zealand:
Melissa Thompson, Chief Executive
Andree Froude, Advocacy & Public Health Director

Department of Internal Affairs:
Kelly Miller, Gambling Policy Manager
Jayne Beggs, Policy Director
Vicki Scott, Director Gambling Regulator

Gaming Machine Association of New Zealand:
Peter Dengate Thrush, Independent Chair

Lotto NZ:
Jason Delamore, Chief Executive
Leah Neilson, Chief Marketing Officer
Will Hine, Head of Corporate Communications

TAB NZ:
Nick Roberts, Chief Executive Officer
Wendie Harvey, Deputy Chair
